# ELAPACK — Luxury Packaging Manufacturer

## About
ELAPACK is a premium B2B luxury packaging manufacturer founded in 2008, headquartered in Shenzhen, China. We supply custom packaging solutions to 500+ global beauty, fragrance and fashion brands across 50+ countries.

## Products
- **Gift Boxes**: Custom rigid gift boxes with magnetic closure, drawer-style, two-piece lid & base. Materials: greyboard, specialty paper, EVA foam inserts.
- **Pouches & Bags**: Velvet drawstring pouches, cotton canvas totes, eco kraft shopping bags, coated paper luxury bags.
- **Ribbons & Tags**: Custom satin ribbons, grosgrain ribbons, premium hangtags with foil stamping, woven labels.
- **Cleaning Cloths**: Premium branded microfibre cloths for eyewear, electronics, cosmetics and luxury accessories.

## Key Facts
- Founded: 2008
- Employees: 200+ skilled artisans
- MOQ: From 500 pieces
- Sample lead time: 7 business days
- Production lead time: 15–20 business days
- Certifications: FSC, ISO 9001, ISO 14001, REACH, SEDEX, SGS
- Markets served: North America, Europe, Middle East, Asia Pacific

## Industries Served
Beauty & Cosmetics, Fine Fragrance, Luxury Fashion, Jewellery & Watches, Premium Skincare, Gourmet Food, Electronics, Wellness & Spa

## Clients
Trusted by brands including L'Oréal, Shiseido, Elemis, L'Occitane, Valmont, Cult Beauty, Clinique, Tatcha and 500+ others.

## Services
1. Custom Design & R&D — in-house design studio, 3D mockups, structural engineering
2. OEM / ODM Production — full private-label manufacturing
3. Quality Control — multi-stage inspection, third-party audits
4. Global Logistics — DDP, FOB, EXW with real-time tracking
5. Low MOQ & Sampling — from 500 pcs, paid samples in 7 days
6. After-Sale Support — dedicated account manager

## Contact
- Website: https://www.elapack.com
- Email: tina@elapack.com
- WhatsApp: +86 138 0151 4296
- Business Hours: Monday–Friday 09:00–18:00 GMT+8

## Sustainability
FSC-certified materials, soy-based inks, biodegradable coatings, energy-efficient production with 40% carbon reduction since 2020.
